title: caroxylon dealatum
intro: Caroxylon dealatum, also known as the Beach Bougainvillea or Bougainvillea glabra, is a thorny, deciduous shrub native to Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Caroxylon dealatum is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including tea, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
